$comment: Single source of truth for all MNE-CPP public API classes and their provenance. Tracks where each implementation originates (mne-python, mne-c/SVN, scikit-learn, scipy, custom), where it is tested, and whether an example exists. Used for systematic porting coverage analysis.

classes.name: InvCMNE
classes.notes: CMNE (Dinh et al. 2021) — MNE-CPP original; deep-learning-enhanced inverse

classes.name: InvMxne
classes.notes: Uses IRLS internally, not direct sklearn MultiTaskLasso

classes.name: ICA
classes.notes: Custom FastICA impl; does NOT call sklearn directly

classes.name: BadChannelsLof
classes.notes: LOF algorithm reimplemented in mne-cpp; should be migrated to skigen

classes.name: Sphara
classes.notes: SPHARA — MNE-CPP original; surface harmonics for MEG

classes.name: DecodingCsp
classes.notes: Delegates to Skigen::CSP; adds MNE-specific transform modes (AveragePower/CspSpace), log/z-score standardisation, inverse_transform

classes.name: DecodingSpoc
classes.notes: Delegates to Skigen::SPoC; adds MNE-specific power feature extraction and transform modes

classes.name: DecodingSsd
classes.notes: Delegates to Skigen::SSD; adds apply() for denoised low-rank reconstruction

classes.name: MlIcaLabel
classes.notes: ICA label classification — neuroscience-specific, stays in decoding

classes.name: MlTensor
classes.notes: N-dimensional tensor for ML inference (ONNX Runtime interop)

classes.name: MlModel
classes.notes: Abstract base class for ML model inference

classes.name: MLTrainer
classes.notes: Orchestrates ML training via Python subprocess

classes.name: KMeans
classes.notes: Direct sklearn equivalent; should delegate to skigen

classes.name: StsCovEstimators
classes.sklearn: sklearn.covariance.LedoitWolf, OAS, ShrunkCovariance; sklearn.decomposition.PCA, FactorAnalysis; sklearn.model_selection.cross_val_score
classes.notes: Ledoit-Wolf, OAS shrinkage, PCA cov, Factor Analysis, auto-select via cross-validation — all reimplemented from sklearn; core algorithms should move to skigen

classes.name: StatsCluster
classes.notes: Cluster permutation testing — neuroscience-specific statistical method

skigen_migration_candidates.migration_action: Replace math/KMeans with Skigen::Cluster::KMeans; skigen has kmeans++ and multiple runs
Refactored: BadChannelsLof delegates LOF to Skigen::LocalOutlierFactor
StsCovEstimators::pca() can delegate eigendecomposition to Skigen::PCA
StsCovEstimators::autoSelect can delegate CV loop to Skigen::ModelSelection

skigen_new_modules_needed.rationale: mne-python uses sklearn.covariance extensively for noise covariance estimation; critical for inverse solutions
FactorAnalysis for covariance estimation; FastICA as alternative to custom impl; CSP/SPoC/SSD are sklearn-patterned spatial filters
LOF for bad channel detection; BallTree for fast spatial indexing on meshes
